version: "3"

vars:
  COMPOSE_FILE: deploy/docker-compose.yml

tasks:
  default:
    desc: List available tasks
    cmds:
      - task --list

  generate:
    desc: Run all code generators
    cmds:
      - task: generate:api

  generate:api:
    desc: Generate Go types and server interface from OpenAPI spec
    dir: core
    cmds:
      - go run github.com/oapi-codegen/oapi-codegen/v2/cmd/oapi-codegen --config api/oapi-codegen.yaml api/openapi.yaml
    sources:
      - api/openapi.yaml
      - api/oapi-codegen.yaml
    generates:
      - api/gen/server.gen.go

  build:
    desc: Build everything (containers, server, MCP, UI)
    cmds:
      - task: build:docker
      - task: build:server
      - task: build:mcp
      - task: build:ui

  build:docker:
    desc: Build all Docker containers
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} build

  build:server:
    desc: Build the Go server binary locally
    cmds:
      - go build -o build/server ./core/server

  build:mcp:
    desc: Build the MCP server binary locally
    cmds:
      - go build -o build/aileron-mcp ./cmd/aileron-mcp

  build:ui:
    desc: Install UI dependencies and build
    dir: ui
    cmds:
      - pnpm install
      - pnpm run build

  mcp:setup:
    desc: Build and register the MCP server with Claude Code
    cmds:
      - task: build:mcp
      - claude mcp add --scope project aileron -- ./build/aileron-mcp

  up:
    desc: Start all services via Docker Compose
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} up {{.CLI_ARGS}}

  down:
    desc: Stop all services
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} down {{.CLI_ARGS}}

  clean:
    desc: Stop services and remove volumes
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} down -v --remove-orphans
      - rm -rf build
      - rm -rf ui/.svelte-kit ui/build ui/node_modules

  logs:
    desc: Tail service logs
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} logs -f {{.CLI_ARGS}}

  ps:
    desc: Show running services
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} ps

  dev:ui:
    desc: Run the UI dev server locally
    dir: ui
    cmds:
      - pnpm dev

  lint:
    desc: Run linters
    cmds:
      - task: lint:go
      - task: lint:ui

  lint:go:
    desc: Vet Go code
    cmds:
      - go vet ./core/... ./sdk/go/... ./cmd/aileron-mcp/...

  lint:ui:
    desc: Check the UI for type errors
    dir: ui
    cmds:
      - pnpm check

  test:
    desc: Run all tests
    cmds:
      - task: test:go

  test:go:
    desc: Run Go tests
    cmds:
      - go test ./core/... ./sdk/go/... ./cmd/aileron-mcp/...

  test:integration:
    desc: Run integration tests against running services
    cmds:
      - go test -tags=integration -race ./test/integration/...
    env:
      AILERON_API_URL: http://localhost:8080
      AILERON_UI_URL: http://localhost:3000

  ci:
    desc: Run the full CI pipeline locally
    cmds:
      - task: generate
      - task: lint
      - task: test
      - task: build:docker
      - task: up -- -d --build --wait
      - task: test:integration
      - task: down

  health:
    desc: Check the server health endpoint
    cmds:
      - curl -s http://localhost:8080/v1/health | head -c 500 && echo

      - go test -tags=integration -race ./test/integration/...
    env:
      AILERON_API_URL: http://localhost:8080
      AILERON_UI_URL: http://localhost:3000

  ci:
    desc: Run the full CI pipeline locally
    cmds:
      - task: generate
      - task: lint
      - task: test
      - task: build:docker
      - task: up -- -d --build --wait
      - task: test:integration
      - task: down

  health:
    desc: Check the server health endpoint
    cmds:
      - curl -s http://localhost:8080/v1/health | head -c 500 && echo

builds:

input.content:
name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - "v*"

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  release:
    name: GoReleaser
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v5
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v6
        with:
          go-version: "1.24"
          cache-dependency-path: |
            core/go.mod
            cmd/aileron-mcp/go.mod
            sdk/go/go.mod

      - name: Run GoReleaser
        uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v6
        with:
          distribution: goreleaser
          version: "~> v2"
          args: release --clean
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

file.content:
version: "3"

vars:
  COMPOSE_FILE: deploy/docker-compose.yml

tasks:
  default:
    desc: List available tasks
    cmds:
      - task --list

  generate:
    desc: Run all code generators
    cmds:
      - task: generate:api

  generate:api:
    desc: Generate Go types and server interface from OpenAPI spec
    dir: core
    cmds:
      - go run github.com/oapi-codegen/oapi-codegen/v2/cmd/oapi-codegen --config api/oapi-codegen.yaml api/openapi.yaml
    sources:
      - api/openapi.yaml
      - api/oapi-codegen.yaml
    generates:
      - api/gen/server.gen.go

  build:
    desc: Build everything (containers, server, MCP, UI)
    cmds:
      - task: build:docker
      - task: build:server
      - task: build:mcp
      - task: build:ui

  build:docker:
    desc: Build all Docker containers
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} build

  build:server:
    desc: Build the Go server binary locally
    cmds:
      - go build -o build/server ./core/server

  build:mcp:
    desc: Build the MCP server binary locally
    cmds:
      - go build -o build/aileron-mcp ./cmd/aileron-mcp

  build:ui:
    desc: Install UI dependencies and build
    dir: ui
    cmds:
      - pnpm install
      - pnpm run build

  mcp:setup:
    desc: Build and register the MCP server with Claude Code
    cmds:
      - task: build:mcp
      - claude mcp add --scope project aileron -- ./build/aileron-mcp

  up:
    desc: Start all services via Docker Compose
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} up {{.CLI_ARGS}}

  down:
    desc: Stop all services
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} down {{.CLI_ARGS}}

  clean:
    desc: Stop services and remove volumes
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} down -v --remove-orphans
      - rm -rf build
      - rm -rf ui/.svelte-kit ui/build ui/node_modules

  logs:
    desc: Tail service logs
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} logs -f {{.CLI_ARGS}}

  ps:
    desc: Show running services
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} ps

  dev:ui:
    desc: Run the UI dev server locally
    dir: ui
    cmds:
      - pnpm dev

  lint:
    desc: Run linters
    cmds:
      - task: lint:go
      - task: lint:ui

  lint:go:
    desc: Vet Go code
    cmds:
      - go vet ./core/... ./sdk/go/... ./cmd/aileron-mcp/...

  lint:ui:
    desc: Check the UI for type errors
    dir: ui
    cmds:
      - pnpm check

  test:
    desc: Run all tests
    cmds:
      - task: test:go

  test:go:
    desc: Run Go tests
    cmds:
      - go test ./core/... ./sdk/go/... ./cmd/aileron-mcp/...

  test:integration:
    desc: Run integration tests against running services
    cmds:
      - go test -tags=integration -race ./test/integration/...
    env:
      AILERON_API_URL: http://localhost:8080
      AILERON_UI_URL: http://localhost:3000

  ci:
    desc: Run the full CI pipeline locally
    cmds:
      - task: generate
      - task: lint
      - task: test
      - task: build:docker
      - task: up -- -d --build --wait
      - task: test:integration
      - task: down

  health:
    desc: Check the server health endpoint
    cmds:
      - curl -s http://localhost:8080/v1/health | head -c 500 && echo

input.content:
name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - "v*"

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  release:
    name: GoReleaser
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v5
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v6
        with:
          go-version: "1.24"
          cache-dependency-path: |
            core/go.mod
            cmd/aileron-mcp/go.mod
            sdk/go/go.mod

      - name: Run GoReleaser
        uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v6
        with:
          distribution: goreleaser
          version: "~> v2"
          args: release --clean
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

version: "3"

vars:
  COMPOSE_FILE: deploy/docker-compose.yml

tasks:
  default:
    desc: List available tasks
    cmds:
      - task --list

  generate:
    desc: Run all code generators
    cmds:
      - task: generate:api

  generate:api:
    desc: Generate Go types and server interface from OpenAPI spec
    dir: core
    cmds:
      - go run github.com/oapi-codegen/oapi-codegen/v2/cmd/oapi-codegen --config api/oapi-codegen.yaml api/openapi.yaml
    sources:
      - api/openapi.yaml
      - api/oapi-codegen.yaml
    generates:
      - api/gen/server.gen.go

  build:
    desc: Build everything (containers, server, MCP, UI)
    cmds:
      - task: build:docker
      - task: build:server
      - task: build:mcp
      - task: build:ui

  build:docker:
    desc: Build all Docker containers
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} build

  build:server:
    desc: Build the Go server binary locally
    cmds:
      - go build -o build/server ./core/server

  build:mcp:
    desc: Build the MCP server binary locally
    cmds:
      - go build -o build/aileron-mcp ./cmd/aileron-mcp

  build:ui:
    desc: Install UI dependencies and build
    dir: ui
    cmds:
      - pnpm install
      - pnpm run build

  mcp:setup:
    desc: Build and register the MCP server with Claude Code
    cmds:
      - task: build:mcp
      - claude mcp add --scope project aileron -- ./build/aileron-mcp

  up:
    desc: Start all services via Docker Compose
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} up {{.CLI_ARGS}}

  down:
    desc: Stop all services
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} down {{.CLI_ARGS}}

  clean:
    desc: Stop services and remove volumes
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} down -v --remove-orphans
      - rm -rf build
      - rm -rf ui/.svelte-kit ui/build ui/node_modules

  logs:
    desc: Tail service logs
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} logs -f {{.CLI_ARGS}}

  ps:
    desc: Show running services
    cmds:
      - docker compose -f {{.COMPOSE_FILE}} ps

  dev:ui:
    desc: Run the UI dev server locally
    dir: ui
    cmds:
      - pnpm dev

  lint:
    desc: Run linters
    cmds:
      - task: lint:go
      - task: lint:ui

  lint:go:
    desc: Vet Go code
    cmds:
      - go vet ./core/... ./sdk/go/... ./cmd/aileron-mcp/...

  lint:ui:
    desc: Check the UI for type errors
    dir: ui
    cmds:
      - pnpm check

  test:
    desc: Run all tests
    cmds:
      - task: test:go

  test:go:
    desc: Run Go tests
    cmds:
      - go test ./core/... ./sdk/go/... ./cmd/aileron-mcp/...

  test:integration:
    desc: Run integration tests against running services
    cmds:
      - go test -tags=integration -race ./test/integration/...
    env:
      AILERON_API_URL: http://localhost:8080
      AILERON_UI_URL: http://localhost:3000

  ci:
    desc: Run the full CI pipeline locally
    cmds:
      - task: generate
      - task: lint
      - task: test
      - task: build:docker
      - task: up -- -d --build --wait
      - task: test:integration
      - task: down

  health:
    desc: Check the server health endpoint
    cmds:
      - curl -s http://localhost:8080/v1/health | head -c 500 && echo

      - go vet ./core/... ./sdk/go/... ./cmd/aileron-mcp/...

  lint:ui:
    desc: Check the UI for type errors
    dir: ui
    cmds:
      - pnpm check

  test:
    desc: Run all tests
    cmds:
      - task: test:go

  test:go:
    desc: Run Go tests
    cmds:
      - go test ./core/... ./sdk/go/... ./cmd/aileron-mcp/...

  test:integration:
    desc: Run integration tests against running services
    cmds:
      - go test -tags=integration -race ./test/integration/...
    env:
      AILERON_API_URL: http://localhost:8080
      AILERON_UI_URL: http://localhost:3000

  ci:
    desc: Run the full CI pipeline locally
    cmds:
      - task: generate
      - task: lint
      - task: test
      - task: build:docker
      - task: up -- -d --build --wait
      - task: test:integration
      - task: down

  health:
    desc: Check the server health endpoint
    cmds:
      - curl -s http://localhost:8080/v1/health | head -c 500 && echo

lines: +    desc: Test GoReleaser locally (snapshot, no publish)

## Summary

- Add GoReleaser v2 config to build `aileron-server` and `aileron-mcp` for linux/amd64, darwin/amd64, darwin/arm64, windows/amd64
- Add GitHub Actions release workflow triggered on `v*` tag push
- Create shared `core/version` package with `Version` and `Commit` vars injected at build time via ldflags
- Replace all hardcoded version strings across server, MCP gateway, and MCP client
- Add `release:snapshot` Taskfile task for local dry-run testing

## How to release

```bash
git tag -a v0.0.3 -m "Release v0.0.3"
git push origin v0.0.3
```

Produces a GitHub Release with 8 archives (2 binaries × 4 platforms), SHA256 checksums, and release notes grouped by conventional commit type.

## Test plan

- [x] `go build` compiles all modules
- [x] `go test` passes all unit tests
- [ ] `goreleaser check` validates config (requires goreleaser installed)
- [ ] `task release:snapshot` produces correct archives in `dist/`
- [ ] Push a test tag to verify the GitHub Actions workflow end-to-end

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"
